name: Aurelia Diamond Ring
description: Exquisite 18k yellow gold band adorned with a brilliant round-cut 1.5 carat central diamond, surrounded by a delicate pavé halo. Perfect for engagements or milestone celebrations.

name: Celeste Emerald Pendant
description: A striking pear-shaped Colombian emerald suspended from an intricate 14k white gold chain, accented with sparkling micro-diamonds.

name: Luna Silver Charm Bracelet
description: Crafted from premium 925 sterling silver, this snake chain bracelet features five hand-finished celestial charms with blue zircon crystals.

name: Ruby Blossom Studs
description: Elegant flower-shaped studs set with natural oval-cut rubies at the center, framed by petals of brilliant white diamonds in rose gold.

name: Sapphire Whisper Ring
description: Deep royal blue sapphire set in a sleek platinum band with tapered baguette diamond side stones for a timeless, regal silhouette.

name: Elysian Gold Choker
description: A chunky but refined 18k gold link chain choker that sits elegantly on the collarbone, featuring a high-polish mirror finish.

name: Stella Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Lustrous freshwater Baroque pearls suspended from simple 18k yellow gold hooks. No two pearls are identical, making each pair unique.

name: Chronos Luxury Gold Watch
description: Automatic movement chronometer watch with an 18k yellow gold casing, black sunburst dial, sapphire crystal screen, and a premium leather strap.

name: Seraphina Tennis Bracelet
description: A continuous line of individually set, identical round brilliant-cut diamonds totaling 4.0 carats, secured in a flexible 14k white gold band.

name: Soliel Hoop Earrings
description: Classic and lightweight hoops crafted in hollow 14k yellow gold, featuring a secure latch-back closure for easy all-day wear.
